name: IT Giovanni da Procida
events: 25 May 1944 With a long refit now completed, Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Taranto.
28 May 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Taranto.
2 Jun 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Taranto.
6 Jun 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Taranto.
10 Jun 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Taranto.
20 Jun 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Taranto.
27 Jun 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Taranto.
28 Jun 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Taranto.
11 Jul 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Taranto.
12 Jul 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Taranto.
17 Jul 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted compass trials off Taranto.
18 Jul 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted compass and other trials off Taranto.
28 Jul 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted exercises off Taranto.
26 Aug 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) departed Taranto for Bermuda where she is to participate in A/S training exercises. The first leg of the trip is to Oran.
30 Aug 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) arrive at Oran from Taranto. She departed for Gibraltar later the same day.
31 Aug 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) arrived at Gibraltar from Oran.
11 Sep 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) departed Gibraltar for Bermuda. She is escorted by USS PCE-846 (Lt. F.D. Andruss, USNR).
24 Sep 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) and USS PCE-846 (Lt. F.D. Andruss, USNR) arrived at Bermuda from Gibraltar.
7 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted trials off Bermuda. These were satisfactory and the submarine is now ready to participate in A/S exercises.
8 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
9 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda.
10 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
11 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) wet to sea to participate in A/S exercises but she had to return to Bermuda due to defects.
13 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda. No runs were completed though.

14 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda. The exercises had to be broken off when it was suspected a German U-Boat was in the area. [This was not the case though.]

15 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda. The exercises had to be broken off when it was suspected a German U-Boat was in the area. [Once again this was not the case.]
16 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
17 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
18 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
19 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
20 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.

21 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) went to sea to participate in A/S exercises off Bermuda. She however soon returned to Bermuda with engine defects the exercises had to be cancelled.
31 Oct 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.

1 Nov 1944 From 1 to 5 November 1944, Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted exercises off Bermuda with Task Group 22.5 which was made up of the escort carrier USS Croatan (T/Capt. J.P.W. Vest, USN, also COMTASKGR 22.5) and the destroyer escorts USS Frost (Lt.Cdr. A.E. Ritchie, USNR, with COMCORTDIV 13, T/Cdr. F.D. Giambattista, USN on board), USS Huse (T/Lt.Cdr. J.H. Batcheller, Jr., USN), USS Inch (Lt.Cdr. D.A. Tufts, USNR), USS Snowden (Lt.Cdr. N.W. Swanson, USNR), USS Stanton (Lt.Cdr. P.J. Tiffany, USNR) and USS Swasey (Lt.Cdr. H.A. White, USNR). The patrol vessel USS PCE-847 (Lt. G.B. Gross, USNR) was also in the area as close escort for the submarine.
Bad weather was encountered during 1-2 November causing delay to the exercise programme.

6 Nov 1944 While proceeding from St. George, Bermuda to Port Royal, Bermuida, Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) suffered an engine failure to her port main engine for which she was taken in hand for repairs.
13 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
14 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.

15 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with ships from Task Group 22.3; escort carrier USS Bogue (T/Capt. G.J. Dufek, USN, also COMTASKGR 22.3) and the destroyer escorts USS Haverfield (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Mathews, Jr., USNR, with COMCORTDIV 51, T/Cdr. T.S. Lank, USN on board), USS Willis (Lt.Cdr. G.R. Atterbury, USNR) and USS Cockrill (Lt.Cdr. S. Farnham, USNR).
16 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
17 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
18 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (creeping attack) off Bermuda.
19 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
20 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
23 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
24 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) had a dummy snorkel fitted at Bermuda.
25 Nov 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.

26 Nov 1944 From 26 November to 1 December 1944, Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with Task Group 22.4 which was made up of the escort carrier USS Core (T/Capt. R.S. Purvis, Jr., USN, also COMTASKGR 22.4) and the destroyer escorts USS Moore (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Jones, USNR, with COMCORTDIV 7, Capt. T.S. Dunstan, USNR on board), USS Keith (Lt. J.L. Rinn, USNR), USS Tomich (Lt.Cdr. C.B. Brown, USNR), USS J. Richard Ward (Lt. E.B. Seeley, Jr., USNR), USS Otterstetter (Lt.Cdr. L.E. Whitmore, USNR), USS Sloat (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Cashman, USNR). USS PCE-846 (Lt. F.D. Andruss, USNR) was also in the area as close escort for the submarine.

7 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) departed Bermuda for A/S exercises with ships of Escort Division 4, which was made up of the destroyer escorts USS Pillsbury (Lt.Cdr. G.W. Cassleman, USNR, with COMCORTDIV 4, T/Cdr. F.S. Hall, USN on board), USS Flaherty (Lt.Cdr. H.C. Duff, USNR), USS Frederick C. Davis (Lt. J.R. Crosby, USNR), USS Chatelain (Lt.Cdr. D.S. Knox, USNR) and USS Neunzer (Lt.Cdr. V.E. Gex, USNR).
The 6th destroyer escort of Escort Division 4, USS Pope ( Lt.Cdr. R.J. Montgomery, USNR) did not participate in the exercises.
USS PCE-846 (Lt. F.D. Andruss, USNR) was also in the area as close escort for the submarine.

On completion of the exercises late in the evening USS Pope parted company to escort USS R-9 back to port. Early on the 7th, a crewmember of USS R-9 was lost overboard. A search was undertaken but he was not found.
The remaining ships of Escort Division 4 remained at sea.

8 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) and five out of six ships of Escort Division 4, the destroyer escorts USS Pillsbury (Lt.Cdr. G.W. Cassleman, USNR, with COMCORTDIV 4, T/Cdr. F.S. Hall, USN on board), USS Flaherty (Lt.Cdr. H.C. Duff, USNR), USS Frederick C. Davis (Lt. J.R. Crosby, USNR), USS Chatelain (Lt.Cdr. D.S. Knox, USNR) and USS Neunzer (Lt.Cdr. V.E. Gex, USNR) were already at sea having conducted A/S exercises.

The escort carrier USS Guadalcanal (T/Capt. B.C. McCaffree, USN, also COMTASKGR 22.7) and he 6th destroyer escort of Escort Division 4, USS Pope (Lt.Cdr. R.J. Montgomery, USNR) departed Bermuda to join the exercises which lasted to the 11th of December.

USS PCE-846 (Lt. F.D. Andruss, USNR), the close escort for the submarine was detached for other duties in the morning of the 8th. The minesweeper USS Indicative (Lt. E.A. Comee, USNR) sailed from Bermuda to take over the close escort duties of the submarine.
19 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.

20 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda with USS Alfred A. Cunningham (T/Cdr. F.B.T. Myhre, USN).

21 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda with a hunter / killer group made up of USS Compton (T/Cdr. R.O. Strange, USN), USS Presley (Lt.Cdr. R.S. Paret, USNR), USS Charles E. Brannon (T/Cdr. D.W. Todd, USN) and USS Key West (Lt.Cdr. B. Papanek, USCGR). 9726 USS YMS-306 (Lt. W.W. Turner, USNR) was also in the area as close escort for the submarine.
22 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda.
23 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (creeping attack) off Bermuda with USS Alfred A. Cunningham (T/Cdr. F.B.T. Myhre, USN).
24 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda.

26 Dec 1944 During 26/27 December 1944, Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with aircraft from USS Card (T/Capt. Rufus Calhoun Young, Jr., USN, also COMTASKGR 22.2). [USS Card was not at sea, she was anchored off Bermuda, her aircraft operated from the airfield.] During the exercises USS Breeman (Lt. A.J. McCrudden, USNR) provided close escort for the submarine. The exercises included night exercises.

30 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda with several ships from Task Group 22.2. This were the destroyer escorts USS Haverfield (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Mathews, Jr., USNR, with COMCORTDIV 51, T/Cdr. T.S. Lank, USN on board), USS Swenning (Lt. R.E. Peek, Jr., USNR) and USS Janssen (Lt.Cdr. R.D. Hawley, USNR).

31 Dec 1944 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda with several ships from Task Group 22.2. This were the destroyer escorts USS Willis (Lt.Cdr. G.R. Atterbury, USNR), USS Wilhoite (Lt. R.W. Whalen, USNR) and USS Cockrill (Lt.Cdr. S. Farnham, USNR).
1 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.

2 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda with USS Cecil J. Doyle (Lt. W.G. Claytor, Jr., USNR).

3 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda with USS Cecil J. Doyle (Lt. W.G. Claytor, Jr., USNR).

4 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda with a hunter / killer group made up of USS Reading (Cdr. H.A. Morrison, USCG), USS Manitowoc (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Martin, USCG) and USS New Bedford (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Muzzy, USCG).

5 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda with USS Cecil J. Doyle (Lt. W.G. Claytor, Jr., USNR).
6 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda.
15 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda.

19 Jan 1945 From 19 to 23 Janaury 1945, Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted exercises off Bermuda with Task Group 22.5 which was made up of the escort carrier USS Croatan (T/Capt. J.P.W. Vest, USN, also COMTASKGR 22.5) and the destroyer escorts USS Frost (Lt.Cdr. A.E. Ritchie, USNR, with COMCORTDIV 13, T/Cdr. F.D. Giambattista, USN on board), USS Huse (T/Lt.Cdr. J.H. Batcheller, Jr., USN), USS Inch (Lt.Cdr. D.A. Tufts, USNR), USS Snowden (Lt.Cdr. N.W. Swanson, USNR), USS Stanton (Lt.Cdr. P.J. Tiffany, USNR) and USS Swasey (Lt.Cdr. H.A. White, USNR). The patrol vessel USS PCE-847 (Lt. T.K. Baldwin, USNR) was also in the area as close escort for the submarine.
In the evening of the 19th, USS Huse, USS Inch and USS Stanton were detached for aircraft rescue duties in the North Atlantic. They did not participate any further in the exercises.
26 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) proceeded from Port Royal, Bermuda to the Bermuda Dockyard where she was to be docked.
2 Feb 1945 Having meanwhile been undocked, Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) proceeded from the Bermuda Dockyard to Port Royal, Bermuda.
3 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda.

5 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda with USS Tillman (T/Lt.Cdr. P.A. Dimberg, USN, with COMDESDIV 34, T/Cdr. A.R. Heckey, USN on board), Herndon (T/Lt.Cdr. A.T Church, USN) and USS Satterlee (T/Cdr. R.W. Leach, USN).

6 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda with USS Tillman (T/Lt.Cdr. P.A. Dimberg, USN, with COMDESDIV 34, T/Cdr. A.R. Heckey, USN on board), Herndon (T/Lt.Cdr. A.T Church, USN) and USS Satterlee (T/Cdr. R.W. Leach, USN).
8 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda.
11 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda.
15 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda.

17 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda with USS Trippe (T/Cdr. C.R. Kear, Jr., USN), USS Chevalier (T/Cdr. F. Wolsieffer, USN) and USS Cross (Lt. H.L. Minshall, Jr., USNR).
20 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda.
21 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda.
22 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda.
27 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) departed Bermuda for Guantanamo Bay. She is escorted by USS Cross (Lt. H.L. Minshall, Jr., USNR).
2 Mar 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) and USS Cross (Lt. H.L. Minshall, Jr., USNR) arrived at Guantanamo Bay from Bermuda.
8 Aug 1945 Giovanni da Procida departed Guantanamo Bay, Cuba for Key West, Florida.
10 Aug 1945 Giovanni da Procida arrived Key West, Florida from Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
